text:
# What I learned debugging the harness loop

Three weeks ago our agent loop was dropping tasks. Not crashing — just silently skipping. The culprit wasn't the model. It was the state machine.

Here's what I learned:

1. Every task delta has to be append-only. If the handler returns a partial state, you'll lose the rest.
2. Budget has to be checked after charge, not before. Otherwise you overshoot by one call.
3. Retries without attribution multiply invisibly. Tag every retry with a reason code.

The fix took 40 lines. Finding it took five days of staring at logs. Observability is the whole game.
